faq.q1: What is the Liquidity Candle Tool and its benefits?
faq.a1: This exclusive analytical tool helps you accurately identify the true money flow trends in the market. It finds optimal entry points with very tight Stop Loss (30 - 80 Pips) and high Take Profit targets (100 - 1,000 Pips). The WinRate stays consistently above 60%, offering an exceptional Risk/Reward ratio.
faq.q2: How does the Signal Group operate daily?
faq.a2: The Finguard team provides continuous technical analysis and news updates. Every day, you will receive 2 to 8 VIP signals, with an expected average profit of 300 Pips/day. We maintain a transparent daily Excel tracking sheet and regularly host live trading sessions with investors.
faq.q3: How much capital do I need for the Auto Trading Robot?
faq.a3: You can start experiencing the Robot with a minimum capital of $500 (standard recommendation is $1,000). The Robot automatically trades Gold and currency pairs, with a proven 7-month track record generating 0.5% to 5% daily profit. The maximum drawdown is 30% and is fully adjustable by the investor. Profit sharing fee is 30% per week.
faq.q4: What is the risk management for Master Copytrade?
faq.a4: Our Master has 8 years of real battle experience and currently manages a $100,000 FTMO fund account. Safety principles apply: Trading only Gold, 100% of trades have a Stop Loss, and absolutely no holding negative trades overnight. It brings 1-5% profit per day with a 30% Max Drawdown. The minimum capital to copy is $2,000.
faq.q5: Are there courses available for beginners?
faq.a5: Yes, we offer three levels. Basic: Foundational knowledge for complete beginners. Advanced: Training on optimal BUY/SELL entries for short and mid-term waves (300 - 500 Pips). Pro Class: Master the major trends across all timeframes, utilising both Scalping and Swing Trading for long-term trends (500 - 1,000 Pips).
